scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "blue,green" "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:integrated: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,PYTHON" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "python python-service/integrated_service.py"
